content: TanStack Start (@tanstack/react-start) is at version 1.168.26 as of June 2026, in Release Candidate status (feature-complete, stable API). Key features: full-document SSR with streaming hydration, server functions via createServerFn (type-safe, replace tRPC/REST), file-based routing via TanStack Router, Nitro-backed deployment (Vercel, Cloudflare Workers, Node.js, Bun, Netlify). Server functions are colocated RPC calls that compile away client-side. SSR supports selective hydration.
